title: Equipment+
body:
Are you **bored** of old **Minecraft equipment**?

Want something **new**?

**This mod adds new custom weapons, armor and tools with new textures and _(sometimes)_ custom abilities, aims to expand one of the game's most important mechanics, equipment!**

## **_(current)_ Features**
- **emerald, amethyst, coal, lapis lazuli, quartz and obsidian** tools, weapons, armor
- some **abilities** for some **tools**

**_examples:_**

![amethyst sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e00f60048406819703ca51e801ae79906f8375b0.png)
![obsidian leggings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11e0e84dec1d7927730c4972f44c8747473750f6.png)
![coal picaxe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/425d4974bdb2301c35457512dbd2bdeeae01ebf5.png)
![lapis lazuli axe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c60e9caca5c234fa061b620e9335d06010ff11e.png)
![quartz chestplate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584ff322a34ce3ec1bd4b3ad06bc2c050afcb6e3.png)

### Dependences
None required

## Q&A
1. Can I add this mod to a modpack?
- **Sure!**
2. What will be in future updates?
- new **minerals**, **abilities** and _(obviously)_ **equipment**

**Note - active development!**
